description: The 'Security_Executive_Overview' dashboard in the Search & Reporting app is currently inefficient because it dispatches four independent queries against the security logs simultaneously. Refactor the dashboard's XML to use a single global base search for the data-gathering query (index=security_logs) with a time range of -30d@d to now. Update all four panels to reference this base search as post-process commands. Access Splunk at http://localhost:8000 using 'admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!'.
